tree.name: Micah Peavy
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: NOP sends McCollum, Olynyk, 2027 2nd (CHI own) to WAS and Mojave King to HOU; NOP receives Poole, Bey, Peavy from WAS. HOU sends Cam Whitmore to WAS; WAS sends 2026 2nd, 2029 2nd to HOU.
tree.note: Georgetown guard acquired from Washington in 3-team trade
